message:
feat(engine): add redaction audit contract to structured logging schema

Promote secret redaction audit constants to public API and introduce
deterministic serialization for redaction audit reports as part of the
RGC-065A structured logging contract extension.

Library changes (test_logging_schema.rs):
- Make RGC_SECRET_REDACTION_AUDIT_BEAD_ID, _SCHEMA_VERSION,
  _COMPONENT, and _EVENT constants public for downstream consumers
- Add serialize_redaction_audit_report() and
  deserialize_redaction_audit_report() as the canonical deterministic
  serialization API for redaction audit reports

Contract changes:
- JSON contract gains redaction_audit_contract block (bead bd-1lsy.11.18)
  declaring the serialize/deserialize functions and stable hash field
- Documentation adds "Secret Redaction Audit Contract (RGC-065A)"
  section covering the contract semantics and versioning

Integration tests verify deterministic serialization across reordered
specs, lossless roundtrip fidelity, and assert that contract JSON
fields match the code constants exactly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,6 +54,20 @@ Failure code for contract-level violations:
 
 - `FE-RGC-054A-LOG-SCHEMA-0001`
 
+## Secret Redaction Audit Contract (RGC-065A)
+
+`RGC-065A` extends the structured logging contract with deterministic secret-redaction
+auditing primitives used by logs, advisories, and support bundles.
+
+- Bead id: `bd-1lsy.11.18`
+- Audit schema version: `rgc.redaction-audit-report.v1`
+- Component: `rgc_redaction_audit`
+- Event: `apply_redaction_with_audit`
+- Deterministic serialization API:
+  - `serialize_redaction_audit_report`
+  - `deserialize_redaction_audit_report`
+- Stable hash field for replay/evidence linkage: `report_hash`
+
 ## Backward-Compatible Evolution Rules
 
 1. Required fields and required correlation IDs are additive-only.
